# Local constellations

A personal graph should begin as a private constellation on the reader's own machine. The first
note records why stable identifiers, inspectable sources, and predictable cleanup matter before any
visual exploration begins. It points to the [companion note](companion.txt) so the fixture contains
one explainable relationship without relying on a remote model or a hosted note service.
